definition: The container element for a research data repository.
notes: re3data Schema 3.1 root element. TTA-0976이 Repository 클래스 출처로 사용

definition: The full name of the repository.
notes: re3data property ID 4. TTA-0976 RepositoryName(R4) 출처

definition: An additional name for the repository (e.g. translation acronym).

notes: re3data property ID 4 URL field. TTA-0976 RepositoryUrl(R2) 출처

definition: Identifier of the repository registered in registries.
notes: re3data property ID 5. TTA-0976 Repository Identifier(R3) 출처

definition: A short description of the repository.

re3data property ID 13. TTA-0976 Subject(R7) 출처

definition: Institution that operates or supports the repository.

notes: re3data property ID 18.1. TTA-0976 InstitutionName(R8) 출처

definition: Country where the institution is located (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3).
notes: re3data property ID 18.3. TTA-0976 InstitutionCountry(R9) 출처. [OVERRIDE 적용: TTA에서는 alpha-2로 변경]
re3data property ID 18.4. TTA-0976 ResponsibilityType(R19) 출처
re3data property ID 18.10. TTA-0976 InstitutionContact(R20) 출처

definition: Identifier of the institution (e.g. ROR ID).
Start date of the repository service.
End date of the repository service (if discontinued).
Size of the repository (number of items or bytes).

notes: re3data property ID 20.1. TTA-0976 DatabaseAccessType(R10) 출처

definition: URL of the database license document.

definition: URL of the data license document.

definition: API endpoint(s) for accessing repository programmatically.
Support for enhanced publication / interlinking with publications (yes/no/unknown).
